description: Verify a wallet signature over a SIWOF message and mint a service-auth JWT (didToken) plus a walletProof. Both artifacts are offline-verifiable: a dApp backend can validate them without further calls to OpenFederation.

message.description: The exact SIWOF message returned by signInChallenge.

walletSignature.description: EIP-191 hex (Ethereum) or base58 Ed25519 (Solana) signature over the message.

didToken.description: Service-auth JWT signed by the user's atproto key.

errors.name: InvalidRequest
errors.description: Missing or malformed fields, or message/walletAddress mismatch.

errors.name: UnsupportedChain
errors.description: chain must be ethereum or solana.

errors.name: InvalidSignature
errors.description: Wallet signature did not verify against walletAddress.

errors.name: ChallengeNotFound
errors.description: No matching SIWOF challenge for this DID + wallet + message.

errors.name: ChallengeExpired
errors.description: The challenge has expired; request a fresh one.

errors.name: NoSigningKey
errors.description: No atproto signing key for this DID to mint the didToken.
